name: Zucchini Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/4 cups Quaker Oat Bran cereal, uncooked
1/2 cup Shredded mozzarella cheese, part skim milk
1/2 teaspoon Basil or oregano leaves, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Squeeze zucchini between paper towels to remove excess moisture.
3. Heat oil in a small skillet; sauté onion until tender.
4. Transfer onion and zucchini to a large bowl.
5. Add remaining ingredients except tomato sauce, then mix well.
6. Pour mixture into an 8- by 8-inch baking dish sprayed with vegetable oil spray.
7. Spread tomato sauce evenly over top.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
Serving size is 1/3 cup.
